items.title: CII: Looking Like A Tempting Opportunity
items.description: CII has undergone a name change and policy update and received a significant distribution boost since our last update. Read why CII CEF is a Buy.

items.title: JGRW: A Growth-Tilted Quality ETF That's Missing The Growth
items.description: JGRW is an actively managed ETF holding 25-30 high-quality companies with strong ROEs and free cash flows. Read why I don't recommend JGRW today.

items.title: SCHD: Buy The Dip And Call It A Day
items.description: Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF offers a stable 4.1% dividend yield and a low Beta score of 0.625. Find out why SCHD is rated a strong buy.

items.title: Recession Alert: Trade Wars Threaten To Derail The Global Economy
items.description: A potential recession looms, fueled by an already weak global economy and escalating trade tensions. Read why this could lead to serious economic risks.
